description: Geṭ (bill of divorce). Location: Fustat. Dated: Tuesday, 9 Ḥeshvan 1475 Seleucid = 8 October 1163 CE. Husband: Manṣūr b. Bū Saʿd known as Ibn ʿUmmayr. Wife: Nasab bt. [Farah]. Written and signed by Mevorakh b. Natan ha-Ḥaver, also signed by Shelomo b. Shemuel ha-Levi. Verso is blank. This geṭ was evidently never delivered, and they did not actually divorce until a few months later: see BL OR 5524.7 (PGPID 6190). (Information from Goitein's note card.)
description_he: גט גירושין, פוסטאט, 8 באוקטובר 1163, בעל: מנצור בן בו סעד הידוע כאבן עמייר, אישה: נסב בת [פרח], לא נמסר ולא גורשו עד לאחר מכן
